characters.name: Tobias Gregson
characters.description: Inspector Tobias Gregsonis a Scotland Yard detective in Sir Arthur Conan Doyle’s Sherlock Holmes stories and appears in various adaptations and pastiches. Gregson is one of Holmes’s earliest Scotland Yard contacts, first appearing inA Study in Scarlet, where he assists in the Drebber case alongside Inspector Lestrade. Holmes describes him as: > "Gregson is the smartest of the Scotland Yarders... they are both quick and energetic, but conventional—shockingly so." Gregson is presented as an intelligent and steadfast officer—more conventional than Holmes, but deeply committed and often courageous. He and Lestrade maintain a competitive yet respectful dynamic with Holmes.
characters.personality_section: Gregson is presented as an intelligent and steadfast officer—more conventional than Holmes, but deeply committed and often courageous. He and Lestrade maintain a competitive yet respectful dynamic with Holmes.

characters.name: Inspector Youghal
characters.description: Inspector Youghalis a Scotland Yard officer mentioned once in Arthur Conan Doyle’s canon and later developed in several Sherlock Holmes pastiches. Youghal is named inThe Adventure of the Mazarin Stoneas the recipient of a message that Sherlock Holmes sends via Dr. Watson. The character is expanded in a series of pastiches byFrancis London: Youghal is portrayed as a talented CIDinspectorwith keen observational skills who treats Holmes with respect.
characters.personality_section: Youghal is portrayed as a talented CIDinspectorwith keen observational skills who treats Holmes with respect.
